properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 66/25
 ANDOEYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS FROM 12 JUNE TO 22 JUNE DAILY FROM 1600-0200 UTC. 
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA;
  
 DANGER AREA CHARLIE OUTHER
  
 A. 69-23N 015-47E.
 B. 69-25N 015-48E.
 C. 70-50N 013-06E.
 D. 70-52N 012-01E.
 E. 70-29N 011-54E.
 F. 69-23N 015-41E.
 G.69-23N 015-47E.

  
 2.FOR COORDINATION, ANDOEYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON. TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 / +47 76 14 44 28 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16 (CALLSIGN “ANDOEYA SPACE”). E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO.
 FOR FURTHER DETAILS SEE NOTICES TO MARINERS 10/2025 WWW.KARTVERKET.NO/EN/AT-SEA/EFS AND  WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS.
 3.CANCEL THIS WARNING 230200UTC JUNE 2025
